title: asterolasia asteriscophora
intro: Asterolasia asteriscophora, also known as the star-flowered asterolasia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to New South Wales, Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Asterolasia asteriscophora are said to include wound healing, skin protection, and relief from digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
